kinds.name: Workspace
kinds.description: A workspace entity, identified by its server-minted workspaceKey.

kinds.name: Project
kinds.description: A project (process application) entity, identified by its server-minted projectKey.

kinds.name: Folder
kinds.description: A folder entity, identified by its server-minted folderKey.

kinds.name: File
kinds.description: A file entity, identified by its server-minted fileKey.

kinds.name: Version
kinds.description: A file version entity, identified by its server-minted versionKey.

kinds.name: Member
kinds.description: A workspace member, identified by their client-supplied email address (minted outside the Hub API). Endpoint of the WorkspaceMemberMembership edge; has no in-API create/get/delete of its own.
